description: Privacy-first Mixlayer CLI for OpenAI-compatible chat, local PII redaction and vaulting, reasoning-aware model ladders, live model catalog refresh, and ledger-backed cost proofs.

tools.name: chat_create_completion
tools.description: Create a chat completion for the given model and messages. Required: model, messages. Optional: tools, tool_choice, temperature (plus 3 more).

params.name: model
params.description: ID of the model to use (e.g. qwen/qwen3.5-4b-free)

params.name: messages
params.description: List of messages comprising the conversation so far

params.name: tools
params.description: List of tools the model may call

params.name: tool_choice
params.description: Controls which tool, if any, the model calls

params.name: max_tokens
params.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate

params.name: stream
params.description: Whether to stream back partial progress

tools.name: models_get
tools.description: Retrieve a model by ID. Required: id.

tools.name: models_list
tools.description: List all available models. Returns array.
